positive: A majestic, stylized crescent moon surrounded by an ethereal forest silhouette. The forest features iconic, recognizable shapes like stylized oak trees, whimsical meandering vines, and luminous star clusters emanating from hidden depths. The overall composition should be deeply contrasted: deep indigo and midnight blue gradients making up the background sky, contrasting sharply with brilliant, warm gold and bioluminescent teal elements of the moon and foliage. The style must be clean, modern neo-geometric illustration, designed with crisp lines and solid color fields, emphasizing strong negative space and symmetry, perfect for a central print motif on clothing. Ultra-detailed, vector-quality, high contrast, flat graphic design, perfect for screen printing.
negative: photo, realistic, blur, noise, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, poor anatomy, amateur, messy, grayscale
